column1: # SPDX-FileCopyrightText: 2026 OpenBasil Contributors

# Package-set member manifest for lock row `ubuntu-24.04-docker-packages-x86_64`.
# Consumed only by scripts/compose-phase1-artifacts.sh (package-set kind). The
# lock row pins THIS file's sha256 as the anchor; each data row below pins one
# member artifact by size + sha256. Tab-separated; '#'/blank lines are ignored.
# Columns:
#   relpath   member name (a label; for `url` also the cache filename)
#   method    `url` (download from source) | `staged` (produced out of band)
#   size_bytes
#   sha256    lowercase hex; the member's sole operational trust anchor
#   source    `url`: absolute approved download URL; `staged`: cache-relative path
#   recovery  `url`: '-'; `staged`: the prep script that produces the file
# Provenance (how the pins were derived; basil-y0f): download.docker.com/linux/ubuntu
# suite noble, component stable, amd64. The clearsigned dists/noble/InRelease
# (Docker Release (CE deb) key fpr 9DC858229FC7DD38854AE2D88D81803C0EBFCD88)
# authenticates stable/binary-amd64/Packages (sha256
# ee23b23badda70914fb90302d4abd6c55a20dd2646ac93df65aa68e16a8c74ad), from which
# each .deb sha256 below was taken. The versioned pool URLs are immutable, so
# every member re-downloads and re-verifies by its pinned sha256. All hard Depends
# (iptables, nftables, libseccomp2, libsystemd0, libc6) are already present in the
# verified ubuntu-24.04 cloud image, so dpkg -i installs the set fully offline.
containerd.io_2.2.6-1~ubuntu.24.04~noble_amd64.deb
docker-ce_29.6.1-1~ubuntu.24.04~noble_amd64.deb
docker-ce-cli_29.6.1-1~ubuntu.24.04~noble_amd64.deb
docker-compose-plugin_5.3.1-1~ubuntu.24.04~noble_amd64.deb
docker-buildx-plugin_0.35.0-1~ubuntu.24.04~noble_amd64.deb
